title: Quikr International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Quikr International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quikr International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
